sentences.target: Une bulle monte dans le verre.

translations.fr: Une bulle monte dans le verre.
translations.en: A bubble is rising in the glass.
translations.es: Una burbuja sube en el vaso.
translations.de: Eine Blase steigt im Glas auf.
translations.vi: Một bọt khí đang nổi lên trong ly.
translations.nl: Een bel stijgt op in het glas.
translations.hi: गिलास में एक बुलबुला ऊपर उठ रहा है.
translations.nb: En boble stiger opp i glasset.
translations.id: Sebuah gelembung naik di dalam gelas.
translations.sv: En bubbla stiger upp i glaset.
translations.ro: O bulă se ridică în pahar.
translations.da: En boble stiger op i glasset.
translations.ja: グラスの中で泡が上がっている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article, feminine singular, determines the noun 'bulle'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'monte'.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Preposition introducing the locative phrase 'dans le verre'.
Definite article, masculine singular, determines 'verre'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Nous soufflons une bulle de savon.

translations.fr: Nous soufflons une bulle de savon.
translations.pt: Nós sopramos uma bolha de sabão.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thổi một bong bóng xà phòng.
translations.hi: हम एक साबुन का बुलबुला फुलाते हैं.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive here.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, determines 'bulle'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'soufflons'.
Preposition marking the complement 'de savon' (material/content).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'de' within the noun phrase 'bulle de savon'.

sentences.target: On chasse la bulle sous le film.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃas la byl su lə film/

translations.fr: On chasse la bulle sous le film.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃas la byl su lə film/
translations.en: We push out the bubble under the film.
translations.es: Sacamos la burbuja debajo de la lámina.
translations.de: Wir drücken die Blase unter der Folie heraus.
translations.it: Spingiamo fuori la bolla sotto la pellicola.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把膜下面的气泡挤出去。
translations.yue: 我哋將膠膜底嘅氣泡擠走。
translations.pt: Empurramos a bolha para fora debaixo da película.
translations.he: אנחנו מוציאים את הבועה מתחת לסרט.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ép bong bóng dưới lớp phim ra ngoài.
translations.ar: ندفع الفقاعة تحت الغشاء إلى الخارج.
translations.nl: We drukken de bel onder de folie eruit.
translations.hu: Kinyomjuk a buborékot a fólia alól.
translations.hi: हम फिल्म के नीचे के बुलबुले को बाहर निकालते हैं.
translations.el: Σπρώχνουμε έξω τη φυσαλίδα κάτω από το φιλμ.
translations.nb: Vi presser boblen ut fra under folien.
translations.id: Kami mendorong keluar gelembung di bawah film.
translations.sv: Vi trycker ut bubblan under filmen.
translations.ro: Împingem afară bula de sub folie.
translations.da: Vi presser boblen ud under filmen.
translations.fi: Painamme kalvon alta olevan kuplan ulos.
translations.ja: フィルムの下の気泡を押し出す。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive.
Definite article, feminine singular, determines 'bulle'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'chasse'.
Preposition introducing the locative phrase 'sous le film'.
Definite article, masculine singular, determines 'film'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'sous' (here likely a thin layer or sheet).

sentences.target: Je reste dans ma bulle au travail.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁɛst dɑ̃ ma byl o tʁavaj/

translations.fr: Je reste dans ma bulle au travail.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁɛst dɑ̃ ma byl o tʁavaj/
translations.en: I stay in my bubble at work.
translations.es: En el trabajo voy a lo mío.
translations.de: Bei der Arbeit bleibe ich in meiner eigenen Welt.
translations.it: Al lavoro resto nel mio mondo.
translations.zh-Hans: 在工作中我待在自己的世界里。
translations.yue: 喺公司我留喺自己個世界入面。
translations.ru: На работе я остаюсь в своём мире.
translations.pt: No trabalho fico no meu próprio mundo.
translations.vi: Ở chỗ làm tôi ở trong thế giới riêng của mình.
translations.ar: في العمل أبقى في عالمي الخاص.
translations.nl: Op het werk blijf ik in mijn eigen bubbel.
translations.uk: На роботі я залишаюся у своєму світі.
translations.hu: A munkahelyen a saját világomban maradok.
translations.hi: काम पर मैं अपनी ही दुनिया में रहता हूँ.
translations.pl: W pracy zostaję we własnym świecie.
translations.el: Στη δουλειά μένω στον δικό μου κόσμο.
translations.nb: På jobben holder jeg meg i min egen boble.
translations.id: Di tempat kerja saya tetap di dunia saya sendiri.
translations.sv: På jobbet håller jeg mig i min egen bubbla.
translations.ro: La muncă rămân în lumea mea.
translations.cs: V práci zůstávám ve svém vlastním světě.
translations.da: På arbejdet bliver jeg i min egen verden.
translations.ja: 仕事では自分の世界にいる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; intransitive here.
Preposition introducing the locative phrase 'dans ma bulle'.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular; agrees with 'bulle'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of 'dans'.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; preposition introducing the phrase 'au travail' (location: at work).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.
